Describe the sequence of ingredients added to the glass mixing bowl during the preparation phase.
canonical_answer: At 8s, a hand pours yellow butter from a small bowl into a large glass mixing bowl; at 12s, white granular sugar is poured directly onto the butter; at 16s, a clump of brown sugar is added to the mixture; by 20s, the bowl contains butter, white sugar, and brown sugar ready for mixing.

question: Describe how the video transitions from displaying the finished product to beginning the recipe steps.
canonical_answer: At 0s, finished coconut cream cookies are displayed on a wooden surface with title text; at 4s, a hand holds a cookie with a bite taken out; at 8s, the scene cuts to a hand pouring butter into a glass bowl; at 12s, sugar is added to start the mixing process.

question: Electric mixer beaters are inserted into a glass bowl containing butter and sugars. What is about to happen? A. The ingredients will be blended together B. The cookies will be baked immediately C. Coconut flakes will be sprinkled on top D. The bowl will be washed with water
Is there a stainless steel oven visible in the background?
